Meet  Veristen

OUR STORY

We are a newly established team dedicated to iOS mobile app development, focused on creating intuitive and meaningful solutions. Our product lineup brings together creativity, smart technology, and wellness to help users simplify their daily routines and enjoy a more seamless digital experience.

OUR VISION

We value simplicity, quality, and user-centered design. We focus on creating intuitive, reliable apps that enhance daily life by understanding user needs and delivering practical, seamless solutions that improve everyday experiences with transparency and integrity.

About
Product

Did  You Know？

Your body is an incredible machine—and just like any high-performance system, it thrives on balance. Small, mindful habits today can make all the difference for your long-term health. Things like keeping an eye on blood pressure, maintaining healthy blood sugar levels, and eating a varied diet aren’t about fear; they’re about giving yourself the best chance to feel your best, now and in the years ahead.

Your Guide to Lifesaving Awareness

01 / Heart disease

Heart disease remains the world's deadliest health threat, claiming millions of lives each year. It is the leading cause of death globally, affecting people of all genders and backgrounds, with one life lost nearly every second. Accounting for nearly a third of all deaths worldwide, its devastating impact underscores the urgent need for greater awareness and prevention.

03 / Diabetes Mellitus
02 / Hypertension

Hypertension, often called the 'silent killer,' affects more than a billion people globally—many unaware they even have it. Left unchecked, this invisible threat dramatically raises the risk of life-threatening heart disease and stroke. Regular blood pressure monitoring isn’t just important; it’s a lifesaving necessity.

04 / Balanced Diet

High blood sugar, a stealthy health threat, affects millions worldwide—often with no obvious symptoms until it's too late. Left unmanaged, it can silently damage blood vessels, nerves and vital organs, leading to devastating complications like heart disease, kidney failure and vision loss. Regular glucose monitoring and early intervention aren't just precautions - they're critical defenses against this invisible epidemic.

Balanced nutrition is your body's first line of defense - it's the foundation that keeps blood sugar stable, blood pressure in check, and your heart strong. Just like a precision-engineered machine, your body needs the right mix of nutrients to prevent metabolic disorders before they start. Smart eating isn't about restriction; it's about empowering your body with the essential fuels it needs to protect you from within.

Scan Foods and Track Daily Glucose 

Instantly see what’s in your food, including sugar load, nutrients, and potential risky ingredients. Understand how meals may impact your energy, digestion, and overall wellness.

Chat With Your AI Health Coach

Ask health questions anytime and get clear, personalized answers across topics like nutrition, sleep quality, emotional well-being, fitness, cardiovascular health, and daily wellness routines.

Measure Your Heart Rate

Track your heart’s rhythm in real time with heart rate and Heart Rate Variability (HRV) monitoring. Gain insights into how your body responds to stress and daily activities.

Log Your Blood Pressure

Track your blood pressure and blood oxygen levels over time. Monitor trends in these health indicators and visualize the changes with easy-to-read charts, helping you stay informed about your health.
